description: Feature set landing page — Salesforce Go breadcrumb, hero “Deflect More Cases with Self Service” with Service cloud label, progress pill “2 of 12 Features Configured”, left column “Features in this Set” with stacked feature cards (Set Up / Manage, Completed badges), right “Suggested Content” card with Generative AI promo and illustration

designContext.conversionNote:
SUPER CRITICAL: The generated React+Tailwind code MUST be converted to match the target project's technology stack and styling system.
1. Analyze the target codebase to identify: technology stack, styling approach, component patterns, and design tokens
2. Convert React syntax to the target framework/library
3. Transform all Tailwind classes to the target styling system while preserving exact visual design
4. Follow the project's existing patterns and conventions
DO NOT install any Tailwind as a dependency unless the user instructs you to do so.
designContext.styles: These styles are contained in the design: Text/Link: #0B5CAB, Text / Default: #181818, Icon / Default: #747474, 04 - Section Subtitle / Default: Font(family: "Segoe UI", style: Regular, size: 14, weight: 400, lineHeight: 21, letterSpacing: 0), 11 - Uncategorized / Default: Font(family: "Segoe UI", style: Regular, size: 42, weight: 400, lineHeight: 42, letterSpacing: 0), 03 - Body/Default: Font(family: "Segoe UI", style: Regular, size: 13, weight: 400, lineHeight: 20, letterSpacing: 0), 02 - Label / Bold: Font(family: "Segoe UI", style: Bold, size: 12, weight: 700, lineHeight: 18, letterSpacing: 0), Foundation/Gray/Neutral-100: #FFFFFF, Foundation/Gray/Neutral-80: #C9C9C9, Text / White: #FFFFFF, SFGo Header: Font(family: "SF Pro Display", style: Medium, size: 20, weight: 500, lineHeight: 24, letterSpacing: 0), Foundation/Blue/Blue-50: #0176D3, Foundation/Gray/Neutral-90: #E5E5E5, Foundation/Green/Green-50: #2E844A, Vibrant / Blue / 50: #0176D3, Foundation/Gray/Neutral-95: #F3F3F3.
